summary: Frontend E2E testing completed for BILL4PE PWA. Verified full flow: Landing → Register → Splash (10 categories) → Food/Lunch → Manual Editor (₹145 total) → PayNow (skip QR + manual merchant + txn) → Bill (B4P-...) → Generate PDF (200/application/pdf) → Dashboard (₹145, 1 bill) → CSV download → Trips empty state → Wallet recharge (45 → 545) → Logout → Phone OTP demo login (123456). All 17 critical flows PASSED.

issues: The /logo.png renders as a solid white square on the dark navy navbar — the source image is likely a solid silhouette and a `brightness(0) invert(1)` filter is applied, so no recognizable Bill4Pe wordmark/icon shape is visible. Recommend supplying a transparent logo with the brand mark stroked in lime/white, or removing the invert filter on already-white logos. (Logo is still present as an , just visually unrecognizable on dark backgrounds.)

action_items: Replace /app/frontend/public/logo.png with a transparent-bg branded mark (lime + white wordmark) OR remove the `brightness(0) invert(1)` CSS filter where the logo already ships in a light variant — current navbar/login/register/appshell logo shows as an indistinct white blob.
critical_code_review_comments: PayNow.jsx: html5-qrcode is force-started on `scan` stage even in headless/no-camera environments. It correctly falls through to manual via the 'skip-scan' button or the catch path (toast + setStage('confirm')), but a console error from gUM may surface in production. Consider hiding the scanner block on devices lacking mediaDevices.

Editor.jsx: `quantity` and `unit_price` are kept as raw input strings until proceed-time coercion; while the live total uses Number() and is correct, consider numeric state to avoid future NaN regressions when interleaving suggestions.
Landing.jsx Footer still uses literal text 'billforpay.com' wordmark (not the new logo asset). If the brand is now Bill4Pe, footer wordmark should be updated for consistency.
test_credentials: Email user (fresh per run): qa+<uuid>@bill4pe-qa.com / Pass1234. Phone OTP demo: any 10-digit number + OTP 123456.
seed_data_creation: Each run self-registers a fresh QA user (qa+<uuid>@bill4pe-qa.com) and creates one ₹145 Food/Lunch expense + generated bill + ₹500 wallet recharge under that user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend was already validated 26/26 in iteration_1. Frontend E2E covered Landing, email Register, Splash categories, Sub-category nav, Editor (live total ₹145 from Roti 3×15 + Dal 1×50 + Rice 1×50), PayNow manual merchant flow (skip-scan-btn → merchant-name/upi/mobile/txn → confirm-payment-btn), BillGen (open-generate-sheet → confirm-generate → bill-id starts with B4P- → PDF link includes /api/bills/{id}/pdf?token=... and returns application/pdf), Dashboard (stat-total ₹145, stat-count 1, CSV export returns text/csv, Trips button → empty state), Wallet (balance 45 → after ₹500 recharge = 545), Logout to /login, Phone OTP flow with universal OTP 123456 onboarding a brand-new ₹50 user. The ONLY observed issue is cosmetic: /logo.png appears as a white silhouette under the brightness/invert filter on dark backgrounds — no functional impact, all data-testids resolve correctly.
rca of the issue: Cosmetic logo: source PNG is rendered with `filter: brightness(0) invert(1)` on Landing nav (line 397 Landing.jsx), Register left panel (Register.jsx line 32), and as plain image on AppShell.jsx (line 24) — when the source image already has a transparent or light alpha mask, brightness(0)invert(1) collapses it to a solid white rectangle. Mitigation: ship two assets (logo-light.png with white/lime strokes, logo-dark.png with navy strokes) and pick based on context; or use an SVG with currentColor.
